title: Cooling Juicy Russian Zucchini Skillet
description: A refreshing and healthy Russian-inspired dish featuring zucchini, perfect for post-workout meals, with a focus on herbal flavors and diabetic-friendly ingredients.

ingredients.name: chicken breast
ingredients.notes: boneless, skinless, cut into 1 inch pieces

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned on all sides and cooked through, about 5-6 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
Add the sliced zucchini to the skillet and cook until tender and lightly browned, about 4-5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic to the skillet and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Stir in the chopped dill, lemon juice, salt, and pepper.
Return the chicken to the skillet and stir to combine with the zucchini and herbal mixture.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the chicken is coated in the herbal mixture.
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve hot.
